text.title: Solo Deploy Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Will real users see this change AND is rollback possible?

branch.question: Is the deploy window Friday 16:00+ local without on-call?

text.example: Tuesday morning deploy with rollback documented → run pre-deploy gate → execute → stability window → post-deploy.
